title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FurnitureMart Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FurnitureMart Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FurnitureMart Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About FurnitureMart Holdings Services:
FurnitureMart Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart Holdings Services!
